title: 貸出カードの親子クラス

cases.name: 通常カードの貸出と返却

output.evaluator: (output, input) => { try { const LoanCard = output && output.LoanCard; const PremiumLoanCard = output && output.PremiumLoanCard; if (typeof LoanCard !== "function" || typeof PremiumLoanCard !== "function") return false; if (!(PremiumLoanCard.prototype instanceof LoanCard)) return false; const card = new LoanCard(input.owner, input.limit); if (card.owner !== input.owner || card.limit !== input.limit) return false; if (card.count !== 0 || card.remaining !== 2 || card.canBorrow !== true) return false; if (card.borrow() !== true || card.count !== 1 || card.remaining !== 1 || card.canBorrow !== true) return false; if (card.borrow() !== true || card.count !== 2 || card.remaining !== 0 || card.canBorrow !== false) return false; if (card.borrow() !== false || card.count !== 2 || card.remaining !== 0) return false; if (card.returnBook() !== true || card.count !== 1 || card.remaining !== 1) return false; if (card.returnBook() !== true || card.count !== 0 || card.remaining !== 2 || card.canBorrow !== true) return false; return card.returnBook() === false && card.count === 0 && card.remaining === 2; } catch (error) { return false; } }

cases.name: 通常カードの上限が1冊の場合

output.evaluator: (output, input) => { try { const LoanCard = output && output.LoanCard; const PremiumLoanCard = output && output.PremiumLoanCard; if (typeof LoanCard !== "function" || typeof PremiumLoanCard !== "function") return false; if (!(PremiumLoanCard.prototype instanceof LoanCard)) return false; const card = new LoanCard(input.owner, input.limit); if (card.count !== 0 || card.remaining !== 1 || card.canBorrow !== true) return false; if (card.borrow() !== true || card.count !== 1 || card.remaining !== 0 || card.canBorrow !== false) return false; if (card.borrow() !== false || card.count !== 1 || card.remaining !== 0 || card.canBorrow !== false) return false; if (card.returnBook() !== true || card.count !== 0 || card.remaining !== 1 || card.canBorrow !== true) return false; return card.returnBook() === false && card.count === 0 && card.remaining === 1; } catch (error) { return false; } }

cases.name: 通常カードの静的ファクトリ

output.evaluator: (output, input) => { try { const LoanCard = output && output.LoanCard; const PremiumLoanCard = output && output.PremiumLoanCard; if (typeof LoanCard !== "function" || typeof PremiumLoanCard !== "function") return false; if (LoanCard.defaultLimit !== 3) return false; if (typeof LoanCard.createDefault !== "function") return false; const card = LoanCard.createDefault(input.owner); if (!(card instanceof LoanCard) || card instanceof PremiumLoanCard) return false; if (card.owner !== input.owner || card.limit !== 3 || card.count !== 0 || card.remaining !== 3) return false; if (card.borrow() !== true || card.borrow() !== true || card.borrow() !== true) return false; return card.count === 3 && card.remaining === 0 && card.canBorrow === false && card.borrow() === false; } catch (error) { return false; } }

cases.name: プレミアムカードの上限と継承

output.evaluator: (output, input) => { try { const LoanCard = output && output.LoanCard; const PremiumLoanCard = output && output.PremiumLoanCard; if (typeof LoanCard !== "function" || typeof PremiumLoanCard !== "function") return false; if (PremiumLoanCard.extraLimit !== 2) return false; if (!(PremiumLoanCard.prototype instanceof LoanCard)) return false; const card = new PremiumLoanCard(input.owner, input.baseLimit); if (!(card instanceof PremiumLoanCard) || !(card instanceof LoanCard)) return false; if (card.owner !== input.owner || card.limit !== 4 || card.count !== 0 || card.remaining !== 4) return false; if (card.borrow() !== true || card.count !== 1 || card.remaining !== 3) return false; if (card.returnBook() !== true || card.count !== 0 || card.remaining !== 4) return false; return card.canBorrow === true; } catch (error) { return false; } }

cases.name: 2冊貸しは部分的に実行しない

output.evaluator: (output, input) => { try { const LoanCard = output && output.LoanCard; const PremiumLoanCard = output && output.PremiumLoanCard; if (typeof LoanCard !== "function" || typeof PremiumLoanCard !== "function") return false; const card = new PremiumLoanCard(input.owner, input.baseLimit); if (!(card instanceof LoanCard) || card.limit !== 3) return false; if (card.borrowPair() !== true || card.count !== 2 || card.remaining !== 1) return false; if (card.borrowPair() !== false || card.count !== 2 || card.remaining !== 1) return false; if (card.borrow() !== true || card.count !== 3 || card.remaining !== 0 || card.canBorrow !== false) return false; if (card.returnBook() !== true || card.count !== 2 || card.remaining !== 1) return false; return card.borrowPair() === false && card.count === 2 && card.remaining === 1; } catch (error) { return false; } }

cases.name: 継承された静的ファクトリ

output.evaluator: (output, input) => { try { const LoanCard = output && output.LoanCard; const PremiumLoanCard = output && output.PremiumLoanCard; if (typeof LoanCard !== "function" || typeof PremiumLoanCard !== "function") return false; if (LoanCard.defaultLimit !== 3 || PremiumLoanCard.defaultLimit !== 3 || PremiumLoanCard.extraLimit !== 2) return false; if (typeof PremiumLoanCard.createDefault !== "function") return false; const card = PremiumLoanCard.createDefault(input.owner); if (!(card instanceof PremiumLoanCard) || !(card instanceof LoanCard)) return false; if (card.owner !== input.owner || card.limit !== 5 || card.count !== 0 || card.remaining !== 5) return false; if (card.borrowPair() !== true || card.count !== 2 || card.remaining !== 3) return false; if (card.borrowPair() !== true || card.count !== 4 || card.remaining !== 1) return false; if (card.borrowPair() !== false || card.count !== 4 || card.remaining !== 1) return false; return card.borrow() === true && card.count === 5 && card.remaining === 0 && card.borrow() === false; } catch (error) { return false; } }
